trigger.description: Fires when a moving company contact is tagged for referral outreach

steps.description: Mark contact as in active mover referral sequence

steps.subject: Clearing parking for your moving crews
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

I'm Elliott with Axle Towing. I'm reaching out to {{contact.company_name}} because moving companies and towing companies can solve a common headache together -- parking on moving day.

Your crews show up to a job and the loading zone is blocked. Cars are parked where the truck needs to be. Residents didn't move their vehicles despite the notice. Sound familiar?

We can clear vehicles before your crew arrives. Same-day relocations for unauthorized vehicles in the way of your trucks. We handle the parking problem so your team can focus on the move.

On the flip side, we'd love to refer our customers to {{contact.company_name}} when they mention they need movers. Mutual referrals, no contracts.

Interested in connecting?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 0 - Introduce parking clearing service for moving companies

steps.subject: Re: Clearing parking for your moving crews
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Following up on how Axle Towing can help {{contact.company_name}} with moving day parking. Here's how it works:

1. You give us the address and date of the move
2. We coordinate with the property to post proper notice
3. On moving day, we relocate any vehicles blocking your access
4. If stragglers show up during the move, we handle them too

No more delayed starts because the loading zone is full. No more crews standing around waiting for parking to clear.

We cover all of {{contact.city}} and the greater Phoenix metro. And we're happy to refer our customers to {{contact.company_name}} whenever someone mentions they're moving.

Worth a quick call?

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
steps.description: Day 4 - Detail the moving day parking process

steps.subject: Moving day parking - keep us in mind
steps.body:
Hi {{contact.first_name}},

Last note from me. Next time {{contact.company_name}} has a job where parking is going to be a problem, give us a call. We'll clear the way so your crew can get right to work.

480-288-5526 -- save the number for when you need it.

And we appreciate any referrals when your customers or property managers mention they need towing or parking enforcement. We'll always return the favor.

Elliott
Axle Towing
480-288-5526 | info@axletowing.com
axletowing.com
